items.title: Echteld trots op zijn ploeg na behalen vijfde bekerfinale: 'Als leeuwen gevochten'
items.summary: Leeroy Echteld was trots op zijn ploeg na de zege op Telstar in de halve finale van de Eurojackpot KNVB Beker. Het wordt de vijfde bekerfinale die de oefenmeester van AZ gaat meemaken. De andere vier gingen allemaal verloren.

items.title: Dubbel gevoel na uitschakeling bij Telstar: 'Er zat meer in'
items.summary: Jochem Ritmeester van de Kamp sprak na de uitschakeling van Telstar in de Eurojackpot KNVB Beker met verslaggever Kalum van Oudheusden zijn teleurstelling uit. De middenvelder zag dat er in de halve finale meer in had gezeten tegen AZ, waardoor teleurstelling overheerst.

items.title: Correia wil niet lang stilstaan bij incident Koeman: 'Part of the game'
items.summary: Anthony Correia was realistisch na de uitschakeling van Telstar in de Eurojackpot KNVB Beker. Veel kansen kregen de bezoekers uit Velsen-Zuid niet tegen AZ en twee eigen doelpunten voorkwamen dat de Witte Leeuwen zich naar De Kuip konden spelen.

items.title: Newcastle United 2-1 Manchester United: Premier League – live
items.summary: ⚽ Premier League updates from the 8.15pm GMT kick-off ⚽ Live scores | Table | Follow us on Bluesky | And mail Scott ⚽ Brighton 0-1 Arsenal, Man City 2-2 Nottingham Forest – live 2 min: Newcastle get onto the front foot immediately. Hall bombs down the left; Trippier probes down the right. Shaw looks to have tugged Trippier back, but the referee waves play on. Not too much in the way of fume from the players, but the fans aren’t happy that’s for sure. Manchester United get the ball rolling. They’re kicking towards the Gallowgate in this first half. Continue reading...

items.title: Tiental Newcastle maakt diep in slotfase einde aan ongeslagen reeks Carrick
items.summary: Manchester United heeft nagelaten om te profiteren van het puntenverlies van Manchester City. Newcastle United speelde ruim een helft met een man minder, maar won diep in de slotfase en maakte een einde aan de ongeslagen reeks van Michael Carrick.

items.title: VI Live: Real Sociedad zegeviert in Baskische derby en treft Atléti in finale
items.summary: AZ en Telstar nemen het woensdagavond om 20.00 uur tegen elkaar op in de halve finale van de Eurojackpot KNVB Beker. Daarnaast is er volop voetbal in het buitenland, onder meer in de Premier League, Bundesliga, Copa del Rey en Coppa Italia. Mis niets in deze VI Live.

items.title: Osula strikes late as 10-man Newcastle inflict Carrick's first Man Utd defeat
items.summary: Ten-man Newcastle inflicted Michael Carrick’s first defeat as Manchester United boss as substitute William Osula’s superb 90th-minute strike sealed a 2-1 win.

items.title: Crysencio Summerville sinks Fulham as West Ham edge closer to relegation rivals
items.summary: West Ham looked damaged beyond repair when they fell seven points below Nottingham Forest in early January. Two months on, they could be forgiven for wondering why anyone was worried in the first place. It has been a remarkable turnaround from Nuno Espírito Santo’s side and, while there is still a long way to go, they will know that survival is within reach after closing on Forest and Tottenham thanks to a deserved victory over Fulham. The only disappointment for Nuno was that a first win in four games was not enough to lift West Ham out of the bottom three. Yet while they remain below Forest on goal difference, as well as a point off Spurs, the direction of travel is clear. West Ham have momentum. They are scrapping for everything and capitalised on an unfocused performance from Fulham, with a rejuvenated Crysencio Summerville scoring his seventh goal in 10 games after an error from Bernd Leno midway through the second half. Continue reading...

items.title: Arsenal go seven points clear with Bukayo Saka on target in tough Brighton win
items.summary: Arsenal did not come to see the seaside. They were not here to make friends – which was just as well. It was purely about the points. Mission: Eyes On The Prize. They accomplished it and then some. There were 78 minutes on the clock here when the travelling support got wind of Nottingham Forest’s equaliser at Manchester City. How they belted out their anthems at that point – about previous title-winning glories. The wait is close to an end. Arsenal’s advantage at the top of the table is now seven points, albeit they have played an extra game. Continue reading...

items.title: João Pedro hat-trick fires Chelsea to emphatic comeback win at Aston Villa
items.summary: As these teams emerged for kick-off, the Holte End displayed a tifo proudly flaunting Aston Villa’s hand, chiefly an ace of clubs. By the end, however, they rued a damaging defeat after Chelsea roused from being behind to dismantle Unai Emery’s side and canter to victory, João Pedro scoring a hat-trick to make it 17 goals for the season in all competitions. The Brazilian, a £55m buy from Brighton last summer, was in the mood for a fourth and tried his luck with an overhead-kick, while the Villa goalkeeper Emiliano Martínez prevented Alejandro Garnacho from adding a fifth late on. For Villa and their grand aspirations, it was a sobering evening. Continue reading...

items.title: Anderson saves draw for Nottingham Forest as Manchester City slip back
items.summary: “Vamos, vamos!” screamed Rodri in his native Spanish following a 62nd-minute header that seemed to grab a precious victory for Manchester City. But the title chasers’ 2-1 lead lasted only 14 minutes as Phil Foden allowed Elliot Anderson to run off him and the Nottingham Forest midfielder, from range, curled a sublime equaliser beyond Gianluigi Donnarumma. City’s faithful were silenced. Continue reading...

items.title: Saka's deflected strike puts Arsenal 7 points clear
items.summary: Arsenal extended their lead at the top of the Premier League table to seven points after scraping a 1-0 win over Brighton at the Amex Stadium.

items.title: Man City stumble in title chase with Forest draw
items.summary: Manchester City dropped two crucial points in the title race as relegation-threatened Nottingham Forest twice came from behind twice to rescue a 2-2 draw at the Etihad Stadium.

items.title: Maguire given suspended sentence by Greek court
items.summary: Manchester United defender Harry Maguire will appeal to Greece's Supreme Court after a 15-month suspended sentence was imposed.

items.title: Sources: Atlético's Griezmann pauses MLS plans
items.summary: Atlético Madrid forward Antoine Griezmann has put a potential move to MLS club Orlando City on hold this season now that the Spanish club has advanced to the Copa del Rey final on April 18, sources told ESPN.

items.title: Man City pegged back by spirited Forest in damaging draw
items.summary: Manchester City let their lead slip twice in a damaging 2-2 draw with Nottingham Forest and dropped two further points in their pursuit of Premier League leaders Arsenal.

items.title: Joao Pedro hat-trick for Chelsea blows Villa away
items.summary: Joao Pedro scored a hat-trick as Chelsea came from behind to dismantle Aston Villa 4-1 at Villa Park and press their claims for Champions League qualification.

items.title: Arsenal edge Brighton to go seven points clear
items.summary: Arsenal ground out a 1-0 win over Brighton to capitalise on Manchester City's slip-up against Nottingham Forest and move seven points clear at the top of the Premier League.

items.title: Premier League live updates: Arsenal win, City drop points to Forest, Newcastle beat Man United
items.summary: Enjoy all the action from Wednesday's Premier League matches, including Brighton vs. Arsenal, Man City vs. Nottingham Forest and Newcastle vs. Man United.

items.title: 'A miracle to walk' - Pavan discharged from hospital after lift shaft fall
items.summary: Italian golfer Andrea Pavan has been discharged from hospital days after falling down a lift shaft in South Africa.

items.title: Maguire given reduced 15-month suspended sentence for Greece incident
items.summary: Manchester United defender Harry Maguire has his suspended sentence reduced to 15 months at a retrial following an incident in Greece in 2020.

items.title: Galatasaray fans banned from Liverpool second leg
items.summary: Galatasaray fans are banned from the club's Champions League visit to Liverpool after disturbances during their game with Juventus in the previous round.

items.title: Fletcher banned for six games for homophobic slur
items.summary: Manchester United midfielder Jack Fletcher apologises for using a homophobic slur that has led to him receiving a six-match ban.

items.title: Leandro Trossard et Arsenal se rapprochent du titre : Manchester City rate une grosse occasion
items.summary: Arsenal et Manchester City jouaient ce mercredi soir. Mais pendant que les Gunners ont gagné, City a laissé passer une belle occasion.

items.title: Seul Lionel Messi fait mieux : un ancien joueur d'Anderlecht affole les compteurs
items.summary: Anderlecht avait empoché 5,5 millions d'euros pour Anders Dreyer l'année passée. Mais la valeur marchande du Danois a doublé avec San Diego FC.

items.title: Silvio Proto onthult: dit is waarom Anderlecht plots weer draait onder Jérémy Taravel
items.summary: Sinds Jérémy Taravel het roer overnam bij Anderlecht blijft paars-wit ongeslagen. Met een bekerstunt op Antwerp en een overtuigende 5-1-zege tegen OHL lijkt de interimcoach snel zijn stempel te drukken op de ploeg.

items.title: 'Schalke verrast en wil plots doorpakken voor Anderlecht-speler: heel opvallende prijs duikt op'
items.summary: Moussa Ndiaye werd in februari door Anderlecht uitgeleend aan Schalke 04, maar in Duitsland maakt de linksback meteen indruk. Volgens Duitse media denkt de club nu al aan een definitieve transfer komende zomer.

items.title: La RAAL limite encore le nombre de bus : les supporters de l'Antwerp prennent une décision radicale
items.summary: Les supporters de l'Antwerp ne feront pas le déplacement à La Louvière vendredi. En cause, un désaccord sur le nombre de bus autorisés.

items.title: Spanning bij Real Madrid lopen op: Thibaut Courtois midden in de chaos
items.summary: De resultaten van Real Madrid stellen teleur en de spanningen in de kleedkamer nemen toe, waar verschillende spelers niet langer op dezelfde golflengte lijken te zitten.

items.title: L'addition est salée pour Westerlo : le Comité Disciplinaire n'a pas fait de cadeau à Clinton Nsiala
items.summary: Expulsé contre l'Union Saint-Gilloise après un coup de coude, Clinton Nsiala connaît sa sanction. Westerlo espérait une peine plus légère.
